title: Casualty of war: A country whose leader needs to keep claiming victory is unlikely to be winning
description: Trump has declared victory in his war with Iran umpteen times, but his notion of a win may reflect an American idea of it: had the US taken the hard blows Iran did, it would’ve fallen apart. But the Iranian state has survived and America might be losing what’s not on the battlefield.

title: UK economy grew 0.5% in February, beating economists' expectations by a long shot
